notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds into a double play, second baseman David Hamilton to first baseman Gary Sánchez. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 2nd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Connor Wong plunked
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong hit by pitch. Ceddanne Rafaela to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds out, second baseman David Hamilton to first baseman Gary Sánchez. Wilyer Abreu scores. Trevor Story to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Luis Matos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Matos grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Joey Ortiz out at 2nd. Luis Matos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Matos rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Matos grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Joey Ortiz out at 2nd. Luis Matos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Hamilton plunked
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton hit by pitch. Joey Ortiz scores. Sal Frelick to 3rd. Blake Perkins to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Christian Yelich pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich grounds into a force out, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa. Sal Frelick scores. Blake Perkins to 3rd. David Hamilton out at 2nd. Christian Yelich to 1st.
